meta.title: idweo - AI-Powered Engineering Audit & Automation Platform
meta.description: Confidential AI audit of your engineering team in 48 hours. Detect AI tool usage, grade developer performance, and get actionable insights — all with complete data privacy.

home.heroDescription: Get a complete, confidential AI audit of your engineering team in under 48 hours. Detect AI tool usage, grade every developer, and uncover hidden inefficiencies — with zero disruption and full data privacy.
home.stepsDescription: No complex onboarding. No access to your codebase. Just connect your GitHub and receive a comprehensive team audit — confidentially and in record time.
home.step1Description: Secure read-only access to your repositories. We never touch your code — only metadata and commit history.
home.step2Description: Our AI grades every developer, detects AI tool usage (Copilot, Cursor), and identifies performance patterns.
home.step3Description: Receive a detailed, confidential report with grades, rankings, AI usage stats, and actionable recommendations.
home.confidentialityDescription: We understand the sensitivity of auditing your team. That's why every step of our process is designed with privacy and discretion at its core. Your developers never know they're being audited.
home.ndaDescription: Every engagement begins with a mutual NDA. Your data and results are legally protected.
home.silentDescription: No surveys, no interviews, no notifications. The audit runs silently from commit history alone.
home.readOnlyDescription: We never modify, copy, or store your source code. Only metadata is processed, then deleted.
home.eyesOnlyDescription: Results are delivered exclusively to you. No third parties, no data sharing, ever.
home.confidentialitySubtitle: Every audit is protected by our trust framework
home.guarantee1: Mutual NDA signed before data access
home.guarantee2: No source code stored or transmitted
home.insightsDescription: Actionable intelligence about every developer on your team — delivered in 48 hours
home.performanceGradesDesc: A-F grades for every developer based on commit quality, complexity, and output
home.aiToolDetectionDesc: Know exactly who uses Copilot, Cursor, or ChatGPT — and how much
home.productivityTrendsDesc: Spot declining performance, burnout signals, and velocity changes over time
home.timeAnalysisDesc: AI-estimated hours per developer, overtime detection, and workload balance
home.speedDescription: No consultants sitting in your office. No developer interviews. No disrupted sprints. AI does in hours what traditional audits do in months.
home.whoNeedsDescription: Whether you're evaluating a team, preparing a deal, or optimizing output — idweo gives you the truth
home.ceoBuDescription: Verify your engineering investment. Know if your team is delivering real value or hiding behind AI-generated code.
home.ctoDescription: Identify top performers and underperformers with objective, data-driven grades — no politics, no bias.
home.cto2: AI code vs. manual code detection
home.investorDescription: Due diligence on the engineering team before investing. Assess the real technical capacity behind the pitch.
home.investor2: Code quality and tech debt analysis
home.poDescription: Understand delivery velocity and estimation accuracy. Know which developers ship and which ones stall.
home.beyondDescription: Once you know your team, optimize it. idweo automates the full pipeline from PRD to production — zero manual intervention.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to Audit Your Team with AI?
home.ctaDescription: Get your comprehensive audit report in 48 hours. No disruption. No one knows. Just the truth.
home.ctaSubtext: Protected by mutual NDA. Read-only access. Data deleted after delivery.

meta.title: Pricing - AI Engineering Audit & Developer Analytics | idweo
meta.description: One-off engineering due diligence audits from $2,500 or continuous developer monitoring at $79/dev/month. Mutual NDA, read-only access, 48h delivery.

pricing.heroTitle: The Report. The Insights. The Clarity.
pricing.heroDescription: Whether you need a one-time snapshot for due diligence or ongoing monitoring to protect your payroll ROI — we have a plan for you.
pricing.pilotDescription: See the value before you commit. Free audit of 1–3 developers or one repository.
pricing.auditDescription: A complete engineering snapshot delivered in 48 hours. Ideal for investors, PE firms, and acquisitions.
pricing.monitoringDescription: A live dashboard tracking sprint velocity, AI usage trends, and burnout risks — week over week.
pricing.securitySubtitle: Security is not an afterthought — it's built into every engagement
pricing.securityNdaDesc: Every engagement starts with a signed mutual NDA. Your data is legally protected before we access anything.
pricing.securityReadOnlyDesc: We never modify your code. Our analysis uses strictly read-only GitHub permissions — zero risk to your repositories.
pricing.securityDeliveryDesc: For one-off audits, your full report is delivered within 48 hours. No waiting weeks for critical decisions.
pricing.faq1Question: Who is the One-Off Audit for?
pricing.faq1Answer: It's designed for investors, PE firms, and acquirers running technical due diligence. You get a complete engineering snapshot — team grades, AI usage, efficiency ranking — delivered in 48 hours as a flat-fee engagement.
pricing.faq2Answer: Founders, CEOs, and CTOs who want ongoing visibility into their engineering team. Track sprint velocity, AI adoption, and burnout risk week over week with a live dashboard — similar in cost to a premium developer tool license.
pricing.faq3Question: What's included in the free Pilot?
pricing.faq3Answer: We audit 1–3 developers (or one specific repository) for free. You receive the same quality report as paid engagements. It's the fastest way to see the value before committing to a full team audit.
pricing.faq4Answer: Every engagement begins with a signed mutual NDA. We use strictly read-only GitHub access — we never modify your code or repositories. Your data is processed securely and never shared with third parties.
pricing.faq5Answer: Larger organizations have unique security requirements and more complex team structures. A sales call lets us scope the engagement properly and provide the best value for your specific situation.
pricing.faq6Answer: All plans include GitHub integration for repository analysis. Continuous Monitoring also supports Jira for sprint tracking. We're adding more integrations based on customer needs.
pricing.ctaTitle: Ready to See Your Team's True Performance?
pricing.ctaDescription: Start with a free pilot audit or order a full engineering report today

meta.title: About Us - Engineering Automation Platform
meta.description: Learn about idweo's mission to fully automate engineering workflows from PRD to production.

about.heroDescription: We're building the platform that eliminates manual work from PRD to production — so your team can focus on building, not administering.
about.storyP1: idweo started from a simple observation: engineering teams were spending more time on process than progress. PRDs sat in backlogs waiting to become tickets. Tickets waited for manual routing. Developers waited for clarity. Everyone waited for someone else to do the manual work.
about.storyP2: Our founding team spent years leading engineering organizations across startups and enterprises. We saw the same pattern everywhere: brilliant engineers bogged down by administrative overhead, product managers drowning in ticket creation, and engineering leaders unable to see where the bottlenecks actually were.
about.storyP3: We built idweo to eliminate that friction entirely. By combining MCP integrations with purpose-built AI, we created the first platform that automates the complete workflow from PRD to production — ticket generation, quality evaluation, smart routing, and autonomous code implementation. Zero manual intervention required.
about.whatDrivesUsSubtitle: Three pillars that guide every product decision we make
about.missionText: To eliminate all manual work from the engineering pipeline, empowering teams to ship faster through complete automation — from PRD intake to production deployment, powered by AI that understands how software is really built.
about.visionText: A world where engineering teams ship at the speed of thought — where AI handles all the process overhead, where manual ticket creation is obsolete, and where every PRD becomes production code automatically.
about.valuesText: We champion automation over administration, quality over quantity, outcomes over activity. We build with radical honesty, ship with urgency, and measure ourselves by the hours our customers save — not the features we release.
about.whatWeBelieveSubtitle: The principles behind our platform and our product decisions
about.belief1Text: Manual ticket creation, routing, and follow-ups are waste. We automate every step from PRD to production so teams can focus on building, not administering.
about.belief2Text: Not every ticket deserves to reach developers. AI quality gates ensure only well-defined, implementable tickets make it through, protecting developer focus.
about.belief3Text: We don't count tickets or track hours. We measure what matters: time from PRD to production, automation success rate, and actual code shipped.
about.belief4Text: The future isn't AI assisting humans — it's AI autonomously handling entire workflows while humans focus on strategy and creativity.
about.byTheNumbersSubtitle: Trusted by engineering teams around the world
about.ctaDescription: Stop managing workflows and start shipping code. See what complete automation can do for your team.

meta.title: Technical Due Diligence for Investors & M&A | idweo
meta.description: AI-powered technical due diligence for investors and M&A teams.

solutionsInvestors.heroDescription: Know the real state of a startup's engineering team before closing the deal. AI-powered assessment of code quality, team performance, and technical risk — delivered in 48 hours, fully confidential.
solutionsInvestors.hiddenRiskDesc: Most investors evaluate the product, the market, and the financials — but miss the single biggest execution risk: the engineering team behind the pitch.
solutionsInvestors.keyPersonDesc: If one engineer leaves, does the product collapse? We map who owns what and quantify the concentration risk before you commit capital.
solutionsInvestors.aiCodebaseDesc: Is the code written by skilled engineers or mass-produced by AI tools with no human review? We detect AI code ratios across every developer.
solutionsInvestors.inflatedTeamDesc: Does the pitch deck say "10 senior engineers" but only 3 are actually productive? We grade every developer objectively from their commit history.
solutionsInvestors.teamCapabilityDesc: AI-powered grades (A–F) for every developer based on commit quality, code complexity, and output volume. Know who is truly senior and who is not.
solutionsInvestors.teamCapability2: Pareto analysis (who produces 80% of the output)
solutionsInvestors.codeQualityDesc: Objective analysis of code complexity, maintainability, and the ratio of AI-generated versus manually crafted code across all repositories.
solutionsInvestors.codeQuality2: AI tool usage detection (Copilot, Cursor, ChatGPT)
solutionsInvestors.keyPersonRiskDesc: Identify which engineers are critical to operations and quantify the risk if they leave post-acquisition or post-investment.
solutionsInvestors.velocityDesc: Track whether engineering output is growing, stagnating, or declining over time. Surface burnout signals and workload imbalances before they become your problem.
solutionsInvestors.howItWorksDesc: Traditional technical DD requires consultants, NDA negotiations, code interviews, and weeks of access. idweo delivers the same intelligence in 2 days.
solutionsInvestors.step1Desc: We request read-only access to the target company's GitHub. No code is stored or copied — only commit metadata is analyzed.
solutionsInvestors.step2Desc: Our AI grades every developer, maps key-person dependencies, detects AI tool usage, and analyzes productivity trends automatically.
solutionsInvestors.step3Desc: A comprehensive technical due diligence report, delivered exclusively to you under NDA, with actionable risk ratings and recommendations.
solutionsInvestors.fullyConfidentialDesc: The target engineering team never knows an audit is happening. The report goes exclusively to you. Every engagement is protected by a mutual NDA before we touch a single data point.
solutionsInvestors.confItem2: No source code stored or copied
solutionsInvestors.ctaDesc: Stop relying on founder claims. Get objective, data-driven technical due diligence before your next deal closes.

tabs.selectDesc: Browse your Jira backlog and select tickets ready for implementation. Filter by epic, team, or ticket type. AI analyzes each ticket for complexity and assigns difficulty points to help you prioritize what to automate.
tabs.assignDesc: Choose a developer to oversee the automated coding process. They'll receive questions via Slack DM when the AI needs clarification. Link developers to their Slack accounts for seamless communication.
tabs.processDesc: Claude Code reads your ticket descriptions, analyzes your codebase, and implements the changes. It understands your coding patterns, follows your conventions, and creates production-ready code.
tabs.collaborateDesc: When Claude encounters ambiguous requirements or needs guidance, it sends questions directly to your developer via Slack DM. Reply in the thread to provide answers, and coding resumes automatically.
tabs.reviewDesc: Each completed ticket generates a pull request with clear descriptions, linked tickets, and well-structured commits. Review, approve, and merge on your own schedule.
